batch: Batch146 — Hosted Proof Runner Hardening & Evidence Summary
phase: P0 hosted/public proof execution readiness after Batch145 artifact upload closure
selectedBecause: Batch145 made hosted proof artifacts uploadable, but hosted/public proof still depends on a real GitHub Actions Node24 run with APP_URL and auditable screenshots. Batch146 hardens the final hosted proof runner with fail-fast preflight, artifact manifest, GitHub job summary, and a single post-run evidence summary so the next real run can be judged without guessing.
scope: Add a strict hosted proof preflight that fails if Node24/GitHub Actions/APP_URL requirements are missing.
Add a post-run evidence summary that inventories JSON, Markdown, and screenshot PNG artifacts without exposing secrets.
Wire the preflight and summary into the P0 hosted final proof workflow and hosted CI runner.
Keep source/local claims separate from hosted/public/production claims.
Do not add AI, payment, fake verified data, community auto-public, or role self-selection.

allowed: Batch146 improves the final hosted proof runner/auditability at source level.
The next real Node24 GitHub Actions run with APP_URL can produce a cleaner pass/fail summary.
Local/source P0/P1 remains a closed source candidate only within source/local evidence.
blocked: Không nói hosted proof closed nếu chưa có workflow run Node24 + APP_URL + preflight + screenshots + reports pass.
Không nói public rollout allowed nếu public-rollout readiness còn false.
Không nói production-ready nếu chưa có production DB/security/legal review.
Không nói visual smoke pass nếu thiếu screenshot PNG thật.
